Html:
In video 1 at 4:57 you are copying code and pasting into the Master page, but you do it so fast I can't tell where you are copying from and pasting to.

It looks like you are just copying and reinserting the code where it was in the Master page.  Can you please clarify this step?
I'm just replacng the generated code with code we need. The code is shown.

But where are you getting the code you are copying?

I didn't see that.  Did you already have it in your clipboard from another document?

Which document are you copying it from?

If I want to copy the code, where do I get it?

Is it in another Master page that's included in the project files for download?

_____________________________________________________________________

I went to the downloaded files.  Do I need to copy the code from the downloaded Master page and insert that into the project I'm building?

When I try to run the downloaded project I get an error:  Could not load type 'TailspinSpyworks.Global'.
All of the code is available in the Release or in the Source Repository - or you can e4mail me and I'll send you a zip file.
OK, thank you.  Do you have an idea what is happening from the error I just posted above?
